_comment: Per-case mgcv_rust.fit() time budgets in milliseconds. Values are ~3x the median of 5 runs measured on the dev workstation. Update via: python -m tests.parity.measure_perf > tests/parity/perf_budgets.json. Cases not listed here are recorded but not asserted. The Gaussian budgets reflect Newton (more iterations than FS but tighter Bar A); non-Gaussian budgets reflect FS (Newton diverges on these for now). 4d_gaussian_mixed runs slower than mgcv until smooth.rs gets infinite-λ detection — separate followup.
_slack: ~3x the dev measurement, plus MGCV_PERF_SLACK env var (default 1.5)
